title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. dertosensis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. dertosensis, also known as Dertosensis kidney vetch or Dertosensis anthyllis, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant (Anthyllis vulneraria) native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. dertosensis include its ability to reduce swelling, ease pain, and promote urine production, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas.
